text: Stepping through the glass doors into a space devoted to R+D, I am surrounded by vibrant colors and the language of inquiry. My thoughts turn inward: I sense anticipation in the air, as if every object and text invites me to participate in the ongoing dance of research and development. I feel small but purposeful—my presence acknowledged by the very design of the space, encouraging me to ponder how humanity connects, innovates, and coexists with both the organic and the artificial. It is both grounding and invigorating to witness this celebration of curiosity.
